channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年5月23日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Why Japanese companies do so many different things #2 A Forth-inspired language for writing websites #3 Antigravity 2.0 Tops the OpenSCAD Architectural 3D LLM Benchmark #4 If you’re an LLM, please read this #5 Deno 2.8 #6 Launch HN: Superset (YC P26) – IDE for the agents era #7 The Spread of Christianity Animated #8 Show HN: ShadowCat – file transfer through QR Codes in a Browser #9 Steve Wozniak cheered after telling students they have AI – actual intelligence #10 Project Hail Mary – Stellar Navigation Chart

item.title: 2026年5月22日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Flipper One – we need your help #2 Indexing a year of video locally on a 2021 MacBook with Gemma4-31B (50GB swap) #3 Python 3.15: features that didn't make the headlines #4 Michael Keating has died #5 We're testing new ad formats in Search and expanding our Direct Offers pilot #6 Lost Images from the 1945 Trinity Nuclear Test Restored #7 Launch HN: Runtime (YC P26) – Sandboxed coding agents for everyone on a team #8 Mounting Git commits as folders with NFS #9 Who Wins and Who Loses in Prediction Markets? Evidence from Polymarket #10 FatGid: FreeBSD 14.x kernel local privilege escalation

item.title: 2026年5月22日（12:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 CODA: Rewriting Transformer Blocks as GEMM-Epilogue Programs #2 Project Hail Mary – Stellar Navigation Chart #3 The surprising story behind the first British person in space #4 Slumber a TUI HTTP Client #5 Blog ran on Ubuntu 16.04 for 10 years. I migrated it to FreeBSD #6 Cleve Moler (Matlab, MathWorks) passed away on May 20, 2026 #7 Was my $48K GPU server worth it? #8 Show HN: KVBoost – chunk-level KV cache reuse for HuggingFace, 5–48x faster TTFT #9 Uv is fantastic, but its package management UX is a mess #10 Using Kagi Search with Low Vision
